creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Hi,

I just finished building powerdns-4.1.0_3 in my 10.4-RELEASE-p5 jail using poudriere and although I see the same warnings on LuaContext.hpp (non-deducible template parameter), c++ doesn't crash. The port builds just fine.

It appears c++ is killed by something (maybe lack of memory?), so unless you can figure out why it's getting killed I'm afraid I'm not gonna be of much help fixing it for you.
